desc.en: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.
desc.cn: Google Workspace CLI——一款命令行工具，可用于管理云端硬盘、Gmail、日历、表格、文档、聊天、管理后台等。它基于 Google Discovery Service 动态构建，并包含 AI 代理功能
